id_requirements: Hootsuite Academy account required. No government-issued ID required. Exams are taken online via the Hootsuite Academy platform and are not proctored.
exam_rules: Exams are taken online via education.hootsuite.com. No external proctor is required. Candidates may use reference materials. Pass threshold is 80% for all Hootsuite Academy exams. Certifications are valid for 1 year and must be renewed by retaking the exam. Unlimited retakes with no waiting period.
renewal_options: Certifications expire after 1 year. Renewal requires passing the current version of the exam. Hootsuite Academy may notify candidates before expiration.

prerequisites.description: None; sales or business development experience helpful

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period between attempts. Candidates may retake immediately after a failed attempt. Each retake may require repayment of the exam fee.

domains.name: Building a Professional Brand on LinkedIn
Prospecting and Lead Generation via Social
